moments.title: UK swelters in record-breaking June heat
moments.blurb: An extreme heat warning is in place for parts of England and Wales today, with temperatures potentially hitting 38-39°C, and thunderstorms expected as the heatwave peaks.

angles.name: Heatwave peak
angles.copy: It's scorching! Today is set to be the peak of the heatwave for many across England and Wales, with temperatures pushing towards 39°C. Stay hydrated and cool! #UKHeatwave

angles.name: Thunderstorm warning
angles.copy: After the heat, comes the storms? Thunderstorms are expected across southern and southwestern UK today as the heatwave transitions. Keep an eye on the skies!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 draw revealed tomorrow
moments.blurb: Wimbledon qualifying wraps up today, with the official singles draw for the main tournament being announced tomorrow, Friday June 26th, ahead of play starting on Monday.

angles.name: Draw anticipation
angles.copy: Who will face who on the hallowed grass? The official Wimbledon 2026 singles draw drops tomorrow! Who are you hoping for in the first round? #Wimbledon

angles.name: Qualifying ends
angles.copy: The final serves of Wimbledon qualifying are being played today. All eyes now turn to tomorrow's draw as the main event looms!

moments.title: World Cup 2026 group stage continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage continues today with matches including Ecuador v Germany and Curaçao v Côte d'Ivoire.

angles.name: Today's games
angles.copy: More World Cup action today! Who are you backing in Ecuador v Germany and Curaçao v Côte d'Ivoire? Tune in!

angles.name: International football fix
angles.copy: Getting your international football fix today with the World Cup group stage? We've got the latest scores and reactions!

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup continues in UK
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026, hosted in England and Wales, is in full swing, running until July 15th.

angles.name: Cricket action
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is lighting up England and Wales! Catch all the action as the tournament heats up.

angles.name: Local Welsh angle
angles.copy: With the ICC Women's T20 World Cup being hosted in Wales, which local stars are you rooting for? The action continues this week!

moments.title: England Men's Test Cricket starts today
moments.blurb: England Men's Test team takes on New Zealand in a five-day Rothesay Test Match at Trent Bridge, starting today, Thursday June 25th.

angles.name: Bazball returns
angles.copy: Bazball is back! England vs New Zealand in the first Test at Trent Bridge starts today. Will Stokesy's side dominate?

angles.name: Trent Bridge Test
angles.copy: The Blackcaps are in town! Day one of the England vs New Zealand Test is underway at Trent Bridge. Get ready for some classic Test cricket!

moments.title: EFL 2026/27 Fixtures Released Today
moments.blurb: The fixtures for the 2026/27 Sky Bet Championship, League One, and League Two seasons have been released today, June 25th, with the Carabao Cup and EFL Trophy draws also taking place.

angles.name: Fan excitement
angles.copy: It's here! The 2026/27 EFL fixtures are out! Which game are you looking forward to most this season? #EFLFixtures

angles.name: Local team focus
angles.copy: Wrexham fans, your 2026/27 Championship fixtures are HERE! Who's first up for the Dragons?

moments.title: Foo Fighters play Anfield Stadium
moments.blurb: Rock legends Foo Fighters kick off their run of shows at Liverpool's Anfield Stadium tonight, playing through until Saturday, June 27th.

angles.name: Liverpool rocks
angles.copy: Foo Fighters are bringing the noise to Anfield tonight! Who's ready to rock out in Liverpool? #FooFightersLiverpool

angles.name: Rock legends live
angles.copy: Dave Grohl and co. are on stage! Foo Fighters are playing Anfield from today until Saturday. An epic rock weekend awaits!

moments.title: Take That UK Tour continues
moments.blurb: Take That's UK tour continues this week, with dates running through to early July across various venues.

angles.name: Still going strong
angles.copy: Take That are still going strong on their UK tour! Who's got tickets to see Gary, Mark, and Howard this week?

angles.name: 90s nostalgia
angles.copy: Relive the 90s magic! Take That's tour is in full swing across the UK. Which classic hit are you hoping to hear live?

moments.title: Everywhere at Once Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: The 'Everywhere at Once Festival' takes place this weekend, June 26th-28th, uniting hundreds of grassroots music venues across the UK for a unique music celebration.

angles.name: Grassroots music
angles.copy: Forget the fields, the 'Everywhere at Once Festival' brings live music to your doorstep this weekend! Support your local grassroots venues.

angles.name: UK wide festival
angles.copy: Hundreds of venues, one massive weekend! The 'Everywhere at Once Festival' is happening across the UK from tomorrow. Find a gig near you!

moments.title: State Fayre Festival begins in Chelmsford
moments.blurb: The State Fayre Festival, a new music and BBQ festival, kicks off tomorrow, June 26th, at Hylands Park, Chelmsford, featuring headliners like Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette, and The Lumineers.

angles.name: Chelmsford festival
angles.copy: Chelmsford, get ready! The State Fayre Festival starts tomorrow with Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette, and The Lumineers! Music and BBQ, what's not to love?

angles.name: Rock and BBQ
angles.copy: Kings of Leon AND BBQ? The State Fayre Festival is bringing the best of both worlds to Chelmsford this weekend.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival begins Saturday
moments.blurb: The debut Blenheim Palace Festival starts this Saturday, June 27th, with Pete Tong Ibiza Classics, followed by Alanis Morissette, Teddy Swims, Katy Perry, and Michael Bublé over the next week.

angles.name: Palace party
angles.copy: A festival fit for a palace! Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off Saturday with Pete Tong Ibiza Classics. What a line-up this week!

angles.name: Star-studded week
angles.copy: Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé – all at Blenheim Palace! This new festival starts Saturday. Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: BST Hyde Park 2026 begins Saturday
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park kicks off this Saturday, June 27th, with Garth Brooks headlining, followed by ATEEZ on Sunday and other major acts through July.

angles.name: Hyde Park is buzzing
angles.copy: BST Hyde Park is back! Garth Brooks headlines this Saturday, with ATEEZ on Sunday. London's biggest summer festival is here!

angles.name: K-Pop in London
angles.copy: K-Pop sensation ATEEZ are hitting BST Hyde Park this Sunday! Who's ready for an epic show in London?

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 drops tomorrow
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated fifth season of 'The Bear' arrives on Disney+ tomorrow, Friday June 26th.

angles.name: Chef's kiss
angles.copy: Get ready for more kitchen chaos! Season 5 of 'The Bear' hits Disney+ tomorrow. Are you team Carmy, Sydney, or Richie?

angles.name: Binge-watching plans
angles.copy: Your weekend plans are sorted: 'The Bear' Season 5 lands on Disney+ tomorrow! Who's binging it all?

moments.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender S2 out today
moments.blurb: Season 2 of the live-action 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' series is available to stream on Netflix from today, June 25th.

angles.name: New season drop
angles.copy: The wait is over! 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' Season 2 is streaming on Netflix from today. Who's diving back into the four nations?

angles.name: Bending good news
angles.copy: Good news, Benders! The new season of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' is on Netflix now. Time to start watching!

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 still hot
moments.blurb: The third season of 'House of the Dragon' premiered on HBO Max on Monday, June 22nd, continuing the Targaryen civil war.

angles.name: Dragon drama
angles.copy: Still reeling from the start of 'House of the Dragon' Season 3? The Targaryen drama is back and as fiery as ever!

angles.name: Weekly episodes
angles.copy: New episodes of 'House of the Dragon' Season 3 are dropping weekly on HBO Max. Who's keeping up with the battle for the Iron Throne?

moments.title: Boy George is 65 today
moments.blurb: Iconic Culture Club frontman Boy George celebrates his 65th birthday today, June 25th. (Born 1961)

angles.name: Happy 65th
angles.copy: It's Boy George's 65th birthday today! The Culture Club legend still bringing colour and hits. What's your favourite Boy George track? #BoyGeorge

angles.name: 80s icon
angles.copy: Celebrating an 80s icon today! Boy George turns 65. From 'Karma Chameleon' to 'Do You Really Want to Hurt Me?', his music is timeless. #80sMusic

moments.title: Carly Simon turns 81 today
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for hits like 'You're So Vain', celebrates her 81st birthday today, June 25th. (Born 1945)

angles.name: Music legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st birthday to the incredible Carly Simon! 'You're So Vain' is just one of her many classics. What's your favourite? #CarlySimon

angles.name: 70s superstar
angles.copy: Celebrating the timeless talent of Carly Simon, who turns 81 today! Her voice defined an era. #70sMusic

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33 tomorrow
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday tomorrow, June 26th. (Born 1993)

angles.name: Pop princess turns 33
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 33rd birthday to the one and only Ariana Grande tomorrow! Get ready for 'Thank U, Next' on repeat. #ArianaGrande

angles.name: Tomorrow's celebration
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday! What's your go-to Ariana track? #PopHits

moments.title: Shirley Manson is 60 on Saturday
moments.blurb: Garbage frontwoman and rock icon Shirley Manson celebrates her 60th birthday this Saturday, June 27th. (Born 1966)

angles.name: Rock icon turns 60
angles.copy: Happy 60th birthday to the incredible Shirley Manson this Saturday! The Garbage frontwoman still rocking. #ShirleyManson

angles.name: 90s queen
angles.copy: Celebrating a true 90s queen this weekend! Shirley Manson of Garbage turns 60 on Saturday. What's your favourite Garbage hit? #90sRock

moments.title: Mel Brooks' 100th Birthday & TV Tribute
moments.blurb: Legendary filmmaker and comedian Mel Brooks celebrates his 100th birthday on Sunday, June 28th, with BBC Four showing his classic film 'The Producers' tonight.

angles.name: Comedy legend 100
angles.copy: A true legend turns 100 this Sunday! Mel Brooks' comedic genius is unparalleled. Catch 'The Producers' tonight on BBC Four!

angles.name: The Producers on TV
angles.copy: Celebrating Mel Brooks' 100th birthday with a classic! 'The Producers' is on BBC Four tonight. A must-watch for comedy fans!

moments.title: Debbie Harry turns 81 next Monday
moments.blurb: Blondie icon Debbie Harry will celebrate her 81st birthday next Monday, July 1st. (Born 1945)

angles.name: Punk rock queen
angles.copy: Next Monday, the legendary Debbie Harry turns 81! The ultimate punk rock queen and Blondie icon. #DebbieHarry

angles.name: Blondie forever
angles.copy: Prepare for a celebration next week! Debbie Harry's 81st birthday is on July 1st. What's your favourite Blondie hit? #Blondie
